summary: SSR SEO HTML validation on preview URL: 18/18 pytest cases pass. Raw HTML (curl/requests, no JS) contains full H1, all 8 H2 SEO sections, Organization/WebSite/LocalBusiness/Service/Article/Person/FAQPage JSON-LD schemas, canonical tags, unique title/meta for all 5 tested pages, internal links to services/areas/models/blog, English route works, and homepage weighs 24560 bytes.
critical_code_review_comments: ssr-server.js auto-build guard via execSync is fine for cold boot but blocks event loop for the full yarn build duration; consider a build lock/health endpoint if scaling to multi-instance.
backend CORS_ORIGINS='*' is permissive — acceptable while both preview+prod share backend, but consider explicit allow-list once prod URL is finalized.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SSR test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_ssr_seo_html.py hits preview URL (Googlebot UA) via raw requests and asserts SEO structure in initial HTML response. All 18 checks pass. Homepage=24560B. Do NOT test production URL (fix not deployed there yet).
